creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Have you tried for the sake of debugging to disable the optimzation we additionally add?
LTO_UNSAFE=yes

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/Mk/Uses/cargo.mk?id=967022fd812cf67dec264ee4e53bd016b69e7a2b

Some optimization is also defined by upstream,
https://github.com/lapce/lapce/blob/master/Cargo.toml#L96 which you might also want to adjust
